title: Now can not inherit 'VerilatedVcdFile' class anymore. why?
body:
On 'Verilator 4.106 2020-12-02'

I found some build broken with "verilated_vcd_c.h".  
This is because 'VerilatedVcdFile' is set to "**final**" class.
So there is no way to override input paramter on 'VerilatedVcdC' class constructor.
`explicit VerilatedVcdC(VerilatedVcdFile* filep = nullptr)`
Was this a necessary?
I need a overriding feature with 'VerilatedVcdFile' to display real-time waveform on GTKWave.
Could you remove this 'final' attribute again?

please check out this class.
https://github.com/testdrive-profiling-master/release/blob/master/include/verilator/verilated_vcd_gtkwave.h
